LightningComponentBundle.description: Adds Agent Assist Container UI Module to a Salesforce Record Page.

property.name: debugMode
property.label: Debug Mode
property.description: Enable debug logging to the browser console.

property.name: endpoint
property.label: UI Connector Endpoint
property.description: The URL of your UI Connector endpoint. [Required]

property.name: conversationProfile
property.label: Conversation Profile
property.description: The full resource name of the Conversation Profile. [Required]

property.name: channel
property.label: Channel
property.description: The type of conversation channel, either 'chat' or 'voice'. [Required]

property.name: platform
property.label: Platform
property.description: The Salesforce platform integration (e.g., messaging, twilioflex, servicecloudvoice-nice). [Required]

property.name: consumerKey
property.label: Connected App Consumer Key
property.description: The Consumer Key from your Salesforce Connected App for authentication. [Required]

property.name: consumerSecret
property.label: Connected App Consumer Secret
property.description: The Consumer Secret from your Salesforce Connected App for authentication. [Required]

property.name: containerHeight
property.label: Container Height
property.description: The height of the Agent Assist container (e.g. 710px). [Required]

property.name: showDarkModeToggle
property.label: Show Dark Mode Toggle
property.description: Enable the dark mode toggle in the UI Module. [Optional]

property.name: showHeader
property.label: Show Header
property.description: Enable the header in the UI Module. [Optional]

property.name: showCorrectnessFeedback
property.label: Show Correctness Feedback
property.description: Enable correctness feedback in the UI Module. [Optional]

property.name: disabledFeatures
property.label: Disabled Features
property.description: Comma-separated list of features to disable in the UI Modules. See https://docs.cloud.google.com/agent-assist/docs/ui-modules-container-v2#properties. [Optional]
